{{Quote|Docking control, this is supply shuttle Epsilon Four, request clearance to come onboard.|Ru Murleen contacting the ''Terror''|<ref name="Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire">''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Epsilon Four''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class]] shuttle used for resupplying the Star Dreadnought ''[[Terror]]''. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], it was hijacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operatives [[Rookie One]] and [[Ru Murleen]] while receiving cargo on [[Imdaar/Legends|Imdaar]] to gain access to the ''Terror''. It was supposedly still aboard the Star Dreadnought when it was destroyed shortly thereafter.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]''
